member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IO operations.

member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Json.IFileHandler.ReadAll(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.
member.returns: File content as string.

members.member:

member.summary: Gets or sets the File handler.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Schema file path for this TM.

member.summary: Gets or sets the error list from the schema validation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Json.JsonSchemaValidator.ValidateFile(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the validation for a file with the json schema. Adds validation errors to a common list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Json.JsonSchemaValidator.GetSchemaValidator(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a schema validation instance from a json schema file.
member.returns: Schema validator instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Json.JsonSchemaValidator.GetSchemaFileContent(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the content of a json schema file from the filesystem.
member.returns: Text content of the file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Json.JsonSchemaValidator.GetErrorDetails
member.summary: Gets all the validation errors detail as a string.
member.returns: All validation errors details.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.ContactResistanceTest
member.summary: It is the Contact Resistance test and its outcome.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Print test results to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.ContactResistanceTest.DidTestFailed(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.PinUnderTest)
member.summary: Checks if the test failed.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.summary: It is the Opens test and its outcome.

member.summary: Print test results to ituff.

member.summary: Checks if the test failed.

member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.TestType
member.summary: Indicates the type of test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.TestType.Opens
member.summary: Test succedded.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.TestType.Shorts
member.summary: Test failed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.TestType.ContactResistance
member.summary: The test outcome doesnt matter because it is masked.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test
member.summary: It is the test and its outcome.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.TestType
member.summary: Gets or sets the test type of the current test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.FailedChannelsFormatted
member.summary: Gets the list of all the failed pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.PassChannelsFormatted
member.summary: Gets the list of passing pin objects.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.FailedPinObjects
member.summary: Gets the list of failed pin objects.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.ProcessPinResult(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.PinUnderTest)
member.summary: Reads the voltage and current values from the pin and sorts it according to the result.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether the test passed or not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.ClearPreviousResults
member.summary: Clears the results of the previous tests.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.Test.DidTestFailed(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ContactResistance.PinUnderTest)
member.summary: Checks if the test failed.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod
member.summary: Contact resistance test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.pinGroups
member.summary: Contains a map with pin name to pin group object.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.individualPins
member.summary: Contains a map with pin name to pin objects of pins to be tested individually without a pin group.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.contactResistanceTest
member.summary: Instance of Contact Resistance test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.opensTest
member.summary: Instance of Opens test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.shortsTest
member.summary: Instance of Shorts test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.xiuName
member.summary: Name of the current XIU.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of the levels file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.SetupFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path of the Setup file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the file handler.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeContactResistanceTestMethod.IsSchemaValidationEnabled
member.summary: Returns if the schema validation should be processed for the configuration files handled by Aleph. By default schema validation is disabled. But if IsSysCFileServiceUp = False (not a VPO or Production) the validation is enabled automatically. This is to avoid the user to be aware of enabling the validation for local/eng runs or forget to set to False the parameter in a production TP to save init time.
member.returns: True is schema validation for configuration files should be executed.

member.summary: Indicates that all the pins passed the contact test.

member.summary: Indicates that all the pins passed the contact test.

member.summary: Indicates that all the pins passed the contact test.

member.summary: Indicates there was an error.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest.SetTestLimits(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the limits.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest.SetTestMasks(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the masks corresponding to the test type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest.IsMasked(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.TestType)
member.summary: Gets whether or not the pin is masked for that specific test type.
member.returns: Whether or not the pin is masked for that specific test type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest.GetTestStatus(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.TestType)
member.summary: Returns the status of the test.
member.returns: Whether or not the pin is masked for that specific test type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest.SetTestStatus(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.TestType,Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.TestStatus)
member.summary: Returns the status of the test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.OpensTest
member.summary: It is the Opens test and its outcome.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.OpensTest.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.OpensTest.GetFailedPins(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get string with pins failing the test.
member.param: Whether it has a maximum of pins to add on the string.
Maximum number of pins to add on the string.
member.returns: Comma separated string with the pins failing the test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.OpensTest.DidTestFailed(Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.PinUnderTest)
member.summary: Checks if the test failed.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Checks if the test failed.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.summary: Indicates the type of test.

member.summary: Test succedded.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.ElectricalZAlignment.TestType.Shorts
member.summary: Test failed.

member.summary: Indicates the status of the test.

member.summary: Indicates that the test passed.

member.summary: Indicates that the test failed.

member.summary: Indicates that test is not done yet.

member.summary: It is the test and its outcome.

member.summary: Constant to be compared against the limits.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether at least one test passed.

member.summary: Gets the list of all the failed pins.

member.summary: Gets or sets the test type of the current test.

member.summary: Gets the list of failed pin objects.

member.summary: Reads the voltage and current values from the pin and sorts it according to the result.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.

member.summary: Print test results to ituff.

member.summary: Checks if the test failed.
member.param: Pin object to get the results from.
member.returns: Whether or not the test failed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod
member.summary: Electrical Z Alignment test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.pinGroups
member.summary: Contains a map with pin name to pin group object.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.individualPins
member.summary: Contains a map with pin name to pin objects of pins to be tested individually without a pin group.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.opensTest
member.summary: Instance of Opens test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.shortsTest
member.summary: Instance of Shorts test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of the levels file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.SetupFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path of the Setup file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.ItuffDataloggingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether or not the Test Method will do the Ituff Datalogging.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the file handler.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Siu.PrimeElectricalZAlignmentTestMethod.IsSchemaValidationEnabled
member.summary: Returns if the schema validation should be processed for the configuration files handled by Aleph. By default schema validation is disabled. But if IsSysCFileServiceUp = False (not a VPO or Production) the validation is enabled automatically. This is to avoid the user to be aware of enabling the validation for local/eng runs or forget to set to False the parameter in a production TP to save init time.
member.returns: True is schema validation for configuration files should be executed.
